aboutUs_footer: Every drop counts. Join us in our mission to provide a better life for all and ensure that blood reaches those in need, anytime, anywhere.
footer_copyright: © 2026 Qatrah Hayat. Developed with ❤️ for Humanity.
HERO_SUBTITLE: A single donation can save multiple lives. Be the reason someone gets a second chance today.
aboutUs_subtitle: A web platform for managing blood donations and blood requests, aimed at facilitating access to blood bank services, organizing campaigns, and improving inventory management in an organized and secure manner.
CARD_TEXT_1: Browse campaigns, find nearby branches, and track your donation history with ease.
CARD_TEXT_2: Submit a request based on blood type and quantity, and track the status step by step.
CARD_TEXT_3: Supports staff and management in organizing branches, campaigns, and reports clearly.
CAMPAIGNS_SUBTITLE: Explore available campaigns and help save lives.
CAMPAIGN_1_DESC: A campus blood donation campaign to support inventory and urgent needs.
CAMPAIGN_2_DESC: A donation campaign in collaboration with the hospital to support surgeries and emergencies.
CAMPAIGN_3_DESC: A community-based campaign to make donating easier for local donors.
HOW_SUBTITLE: Three simple steps to donate or request blood and track everything easily.
HOW_STEP1_TEXT: Register your basic details to donate blood, request blood, and access platform services.
HOW_STEP2_TEXT: Explore nearby donation campaigns or submit a blood request by blood type and quantity quickly.
HOW_STEP3_TEXT: Track your donation history and request status, and receive notifications when your blood type is needed.
HOW_CTA_TEXT: Create an account to join the donor network and access blood services faster when needed.
LOGIN_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Log in and make a difference today.
